review_title: Exceeds Expectations: Cutting Edge Sidekick for your Research with White Glove Customer Service
description: The overall experience was outstanding, serving as an exemplary lesson for any new startup in maintaining exceptional customer service and adhering faithfully to the product roadmap.
author: Victor J.
pros: My recent experience with Afforai, a purchase from AppSumo and initial trials from Product Hunt, has been nothing short of remarkable, significantly exceeding expectations in customer service, ease of use, and accuracy. This isn't just another software tool; it's a game-changer for anyone interested in leveraging the power of language learning models like ChatGPT. More than just AskMyPDF. Firstly, the customer service is exemplary. [sensitive content hidden] and his team set a gold standard for how SaaS customer service should be delivered. Their responsiveness and helpfulness are unparalleled, making the user experience exceptionally smooth. It's rare to see a team so dedicated to user satisfaction, and they even inspired me to suggest that they could teach a course on the subject! The functionality of Afforai is where it truly shines. Its ability to convert PDF and even URLs into simple study guides is a massive time-saver for my team. Initially, I tested it be like an help desk to understand a product and service better. But [sensitive content hidden and the team helped me with an “A HA moment” and I refocused on how better to utilize the tool. Additionally, Afforai's capability to distill files into concise study guides and extract relevant Q&A for any knowledge worker. Having the opportunity to interact with [sensitive content hidden], helped me dearly. And it shows his passion to understand the voice of the customer and to improve the product for user retention and use. Afforai sets a high bar for AppSumo and Product Hunt offerings. It's not just about getting a good deal; it's about supporting and appreciating vendors who go the extra mile. As a satisfied user, I invite others to join me in this endeavor. Afforai is not just a product; it's a community and a movement towards better tech solutions.
cons: There's not much to dislike about the tool. My only minor gripe is the lack of tutorials. However, as the community grows, more YouTube tutorials are becoming available. Honestly, the tool is quite self-explanatory. Even if you've never worked with APIs or other chatbots, it's easy to figure out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I switched from a paid version of ChatGPT to Afforai
description: It's not even just about the software but the fact the community is so helpful and the [sensitive content hidden] is accessible. He reads my emails and replies to them.
author: Mark V.
pros: I have a paid version of ChatGPT, but I use Afforai for two reasons: 1) it actually gives me better, longer responses. 2) it gives me citations so that I can see where the information came from.
cons: The only downside I ever found was having to learn a new interface, but the onboarding more than took care of that.

review_title: Make use of old eBooks and PDF files!
description: My overall experience has been great. Good customer support, easy to set up and start using, and helpful to have a research assistant tool.
author: Dan S.
pros: I like that I can communicate with specific documents as well as cross-reference the internet in the process. The ability to reference multiple documents in a query is also really beneficial. Each response has citations given to cross-check the answer.
cons: I dislike that it costs AI credits to upload documents. I will likely have to re-upload documents after compressing them now that the platform has switched from a number of documents limit to a storage size limit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A real winner in the Chatbot race

author: Dan M.
pros: This system can efficiently query multiple documents at once. It also possesses the capability to share the derived information among several chatbots. This dual functionality enhances the system's overall performance and utility.
cons: We are hoping they implement the ability to use our own Open AI keys.

description: Out of the box it just works, as a blog writer, this will shorten my production time and become my go-to tool for research. I've purchased a lot of LTDs and all I'll say is this app is going places. Don't sit on the fence with this one

pros: The UI dashboard has been well thought out and designed, making it a breeze to navigate. Creating a chatbot is a piece of cake, and uploading documents is lightning-fast. Where it really excels is in its output. The quality is top-notch, surpassing that of similar apps.
cons: Nothing at this point in time. I think as more features get added it would replace other tools.

review_title: Good, but the support and unfulfilled promises to LTD users tarnish the overall experience.
description: I have used Logically with great satisfaction and found it immensely valuable for crafting texts supported by scientific evidence.
author: Mario B.
pros: The ability to generate texts based on scientific articles and reveal sources with a single click is outstanding, as is the feature of having an AI-enhanced text editor. Equally impressive is the option to maintain a source library with which one can interact and collaborate seamlessly.
cons: Il supporto e le promesse disattese nei confronti degli utenti Lifetime. Specifically, I purchased unlimited storage and unlimited AI usage, yet these privileges were revoked despite prior assurances.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Overall, I've been very impressed with Afforai, especially given that it is still at a relatively early stage of development. I've already incorporated Afforai into my research workflow and have even showcased Afforai to my undergraduate students to show them how AI is transforming scientific research.I've also been impressed by the very active Afforai development team who have shipped significant updates within a couple of days of my purchasing the app. I'm definitely looking forward to seeing how the tool develops over the coming months.
author: David D.
pros: As a researcher, I've experimented with various LLM AI tools (such as HeyGPT, Elicit, and Perplexity) for analysing papers and books, but within a couple of hours of use, Afforai became my default AI research tool.It's simply a very well-designed and thought-out LLM research assistant. Surprisingly, even on the GPT 3.5 engine, its ability to summarize and analyse intricate content across numerous documents is outstanding.
cons: The document management system could benefit from enhancements. Currently, user-uploaded files are displayed in a basic list format, lacking folder structuring, tagging, or hierarchical organization. This arrangement is not ideal when dealing with hundreds of files. It's hoped that future updates will address these areas.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The ability to literally train your own chatbot on a particular topic and have it available at the click of a mouse is to me incredible. I am using it for content on the subject of my interest and for education as well.
author: Carlos R.
pros: To have the ability to learn, analyze, and interact with a document on any topic just blew me away. From multiple choice answers, true or false, Q & A creation of the most common pitfalls or best advice for the end consumer, the list goes on and on.
cons: I haven't found anything that I dislike yet. I know there is a roadmap with plenty of improvements based on feedback from the users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

Lo mejor, la seguridad de mis datos y la opción de poder subir los documentos para que Afforai extraiga la información, junto con las citas y referencias a la parte del documento en que sus respuestas se basan.
cons: Todavía está la versión 3.5 de ChatGPT, aunque sé que continuamente la está actualizando y mejorando, así que es cuestión de tiempo.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ask, and it will be given!
author: Razak S.
pros: I recently purchased Afforai's LTD from AppSumo and was excited to put it to the test. However, after trying it out in different situations, I found that it didn't meet my expectations. So, I made the decision to return it. When [sensitive content hidden], the creator, asked for my feedback, I took the opportunity to explain why I returned the product. After sharing my reasons, [sensitive content hidden] offered some advice that persuaded me to give it another chance. I'm glad I did because once I learned how to use the tool effectively, it performed exceptionally well and allowed me to maximize its potential. Now, I'm achieving outstanding results—I can comprehend complex legal documents more easily and have read more books than ever before in a short period of time. Additionally, I'm looking forward to what lies ahead with the product's roadmap and its potential opportunities.
cons: If you, like me, spend a lot of time in front of screens, I recommend using Afforai on a bigger screen. The layout can look crowded on a smaller screen. I'm happy that they are addressing this issue, particularly the implementation of a dark theme.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
